resources.string:
PRIVACY POLICY

The Municipality of Figueira de Castelo Rodrigo and, in particular, the Open Science Platform (PCA-MFCR) project are responsible for the site online plataforma.edu.pt and, therefore, undertake to guarantee the privacy of the personal data collected and / or transmitted online.

  1. What information is collected?
  2. Who is responsible for collecting information?
  3. How is the information collected used?

If you have any questions, please contact us at info@plataforma.edu.pt.

The Municipality of Figueira de Castelo Rodrigo and the Open Science Platform (PCA-MFCR) project are responsible for the site platform.edu.pt and guarantee the privacy of personal data collected online.

Below you will find specific information:

1) What information is collected?
2) Who is responsible for collecting information?
3) How is the information used?

If you have any questions, please contact us at info@plataforma.edu.pt.

How to use this application

The purpose of this application is to make known the diversity of insects through the identification experience. It is intended to be a useful tool to identify an insect.

To start, you have to be absolutely certain that you are facing an insect: division of the body into three parts (head, thorax, abdomen), six legs and wings.
Esta aplicação foi desenvolvida tendo por base a exposição \"Insetos em Ordem.\"
The image does not contain coordinates. Using your current location and date.
Image metadata detected. Extracting coordinates and date.
I know the privacy policy and give full consent to use the information sent. plataforma.edu.pt\n
